meaning: n.<美> 码头,船坞,被告席,尾巴的骨肉部分vt.靠码头,引入坞,剪短vi.入船坞
examples: The ferry is expected to dock at 6.
They dropped the sails and threw a line to a man on the dock.
Make sure to lock the bike carefully by pushing the front wheel into an empty dock.
Or hit the party-filled port city of Bodrum, where cruise ships dock near a Crusader castle.
